tasks.purpose: Read project health and write monitoring evidence without refreshing financial state.
acceptance_checks: monitor report records the inspected input hashes
constraints: must not refresh the project heartbeat
must not modify orders, portfolio, market evidence, or strategy
README.md may be synchronized only when already changed by an authorized producer

tasks.purpose: Prepare a fail-closed pre-open virtual-portfolio review from time-valid evidence.
acceptance_checks: source independence and timestamps are explicit
report input hashes match committed artifacts
constraints: simulation only
missing or stale evidence fails closed
recommendation is not a fill

tasks.purpose: Gate the daily virtual-order lifecycle before any simulated settlement.
acceptance_checks: order state and ledger hashes reconcile
terminal state is recorded without fabricated fills
constraints: simulation only
READY is not a fill
missing timely dual-source evidence fails closed

tasks.purpose: Settle previously authorized virtual orders using a timely opening snapshot.
constraints: simulation only
post-window quotes cannot be fill evidence
a successful write is not market-evidence validity

tasks.purpose: Run close-of-day virtual-portfolio analysis and produce the next decision artifact.
constraints: simulation only
after-close information cannot be backdated
language-model output cannot replace market evidence

tasks.purpose: Apply open-end-fund NAV confirmation rules to the virtual portfolio.
acceptance_checks: pending orders remain pending when evidence is insufficient
constraints: simulation only
estimated NAV cannot be settlement evidence
unknown confirmation state remains explicit

tasks.purpose: Produce and verify evidence-only strategy-evolution proposals.
acceptance_checks: proposal is bound to the baseline commit
constraints: caller cannot supply the evaluation decision
proposal cannot directly modify protected strategy or code
local structural pass is not scientific or financial performance evidence

tasks.purpose: Aggregate immutable weekly evidence into a virtual-portfolio review.
acceptance_checks: unknown or pending states remain explicit
dashboard is derived from the sealed report inputs
constraints: simulation only
dashboard rendering is not financial evidence
summary text cannot overwrite authoritative ledger state

tasks.purpose: Audit and index project documents without changing financial state.
acceptance_checks: indexed paths and hashes are reproducible
generated index is clearly marked as derived
constraints: must not modify orders, portfolio, or market evidence
sync allowlist is not runtime write authority
unknown document status remains explicit

tasks.purpose: Review isolated session-derived Skill candidates without activating or synchronizing candidate content.
acceptance_checks: candidate provenance and pinned file hashes validate
duplicate and conflicting Skill names are reported
constraints: candidate Skill packages remain under local artifacts and are not synchronized
weekly review cannot install or activate a Skill
approval, revision, or rejection requires an explicit reviewed decision

tasks.purpose: Synchronize a separately reviewed current-period release within the repository boundary.
acceptance_checks: staged paths stay within the declared allowlist
post-stage validation and manifest hashes pass
constraints: release synchronization is not task execution authority
simulation-only mode remains locked
push requires the governed sync workflow
